name: tier3_control_id_in_filename
description: RE-RECORDED 2026-06-07 — converted from a positive 'filename match earns a Tier 3 tag' case to a negative 'filename match alone earns NO tag' case as part of the path-only deceptive-filename fix. Body text mentions no control IDs ('Generic policy text with no control identifiers.'); the filename 'AC-2_account_policy.pdf' contains AC-2 but the path is no longer scanned by Tier 3. Expected outcome: zero tags. Sibling case to pin_control_id_in_path_only — that pin uses empty text + path_override, this one uses non-empty unrelated text + a natural filename. Together they cover both shapes of the same attack surface (empty body / unrelated body) so a regression that re-adds path scanning trips both.

evidence.text: Generic policy text with no control identifiers.
